mapper.select:
SELECT v.id, v.user_id AS author_uid, v.title, v.cover_url, v.view_count, v.duration, v.create_time, u.nickname FROM t_video v LEFT JOIN t_user_info u ON v.user_id = u.user_id WHERE v.status = 0
AND v.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
ORDER BY v.create_time DESC

SELECT v.id, v.user_id AS author_uid, v.title, v.cover_url, v.view_count, v.duration, v.create_time, u.nickname FROM t_video v LEFT JOIN t_user_info u ON v.user_id = u.user_id WHERE v.user_id = #{uid} AND v.status = 0
AND v.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
ORDER BY v.create_time DESC
SELECT v.id FROM t_video v WHERE v.status = 0 AND v.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') ORDER BY v.create_time DESC, v.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT v.id FROM t_video v INNER JOIN t_video_tag vt ON vt.video_id = v.id AND vt.status = 0 INNER JOIN t_tag t ON t.id = vt.tag_id AND t.status = 0 WHERE v.status = 0 AND t.id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY v.create_time DESC, v.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT v.id, v.user_id AS author_uid, v.title, v.cover_url, v.view_count, v.duration, v.create_time, u.nickname FROM t_video v LEFT JOIN t_user_info u ON v.user_id = u.user_id WHERE v.status = 0 ORDER BY v.view_count DESC, v.id DESC
